config.notes: Zod schemas, loadConfig/saveConfig with file locking, createConfig, query helpers, resolution helpers. 176 lines. 22 tests pass.

operations.notes: Pure functions for all mutations — servers, groups, plugins, marketplaces, skills, rules, assignments, collisions, deps. 908 lines. 36 tests pass.

clients.notes: 17 client definitions, detection, config read/write, TOML writer, server entry conversion, CC settings helpers, import helpers. 558 lines. 14 tests pass.

sync.notes: Server sync with drift detection (SHA-256 hashes), skills symlink fan-out, sync-all, dry-run/force/adopt. 306 lines. 4 tests pass.

skills.notes: SKILL.md frontmatter parser, canonical store CRUD, skill<->frontmatter conversion. 160 lines. 9 tests pass.

search.notes: BM25-style search over servers (name, tools) and skills (name, tags, description). Ranked results. 160 lines. 9 tests pass.

registry.notes: Registry adapter framework, Official + Glama backends, TTL caching, security summary, token cost estimation, install resolution. 390 lines. 7 tests pass.

doctor.notes: 8 check types across 5 categories (existence, freshness, grounding, parity, skills-health). Structured scoring. 284 lines. 5 tests pass.

projects.notes: Project registry reader via better-sqlite3 (optional dep). Graceful fallback. 135 lines.

cli.notes: Commander.js CLI with full command surface: servers, groups, clients, assign, sync, plugins, marketplaces, skills, rules, pin/track, collisions, deps, search, registry, doctor, projects. 554 lines. 7 integration tests pass.

init.notes: Guided onboarding flow. Not yet built. No scenarios defined.

migration.notes: mcpoyle -> Ensemble migration. Not yet built. No scenarios defined.

profile-as-plugin.notes: groups export --as-plugin. Not yet built. No scenarios defined.

state-owner.briefingDigest: Post-build scan. 50/51 scenarios satisfied. 133 tests pass (10 test files). 10 sections built, 3 remain draft. Only gap: scenario 13 (forward-compat field preservation) — Zod strips unknown fields, needs .passthrough() on EnsembleConfigSchema.
